final_prompt.prompt:
Create a short-video vertical cover for a gaming monitor product launch.

Style/medium: needs a minimalist, premium aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must use rule-of-thirds layout with large-title headline as the dominant visual anchor
Subject: must include the GGU gaming monitor as hero product
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a high-end tech atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "8k GGU 电竞显示器 1000hz" (large, primary headline), "全球首发全新面板 低延迟 完美色彩" (secondary, subtitle)
Constraints: must be vertical format (9:16); headline must be visually dominant and eye-catching
Avoid:
